utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: All right , okay , this is great , uh , Chandler , you get behind the desk .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: And ... and when she comes in hopefully , she will not recognise you because , well , why would she ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Uh , okay , and then you buzz Ross and I .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You be Mr . Gonzalez , and I will be uh , Mr . Wong .

utterances.speaker: The Stripper
utterances.text: Okay , which one of you guys is Gunther Central ... Perk ? Hey , Joey ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Where is my ring ? My dead grandmother wedding ring ? Where is it ? Where is it ?

emotion_cause.span: 9_Where is my ring ? My dead grandmother wedding ring ? Where is it ? Where is it ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: There was a ring , in a box , on my nightstand , after you left , it was gone !

emotion_cause.span: 12_There was a ring , in a box , on my nightstand , after you left , it was gone !

utterances.speaker: The Stripper
utterances.text: Wait , you guys think I stole some ring ?

emotion_cause.span: 13_you guys think I stole some ring ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: We know you took so just ... just save yourself the time and confess !

emotion_cause.span: 14_We know you took so just ... just save yourself the time and confess !

utterances.speaker: The Stripper
utterances.text: Look , I do not need to steal some stupid ring , all right ?

utterances.speaker: The Stripper
utterances.text: I make $ 1600 a week doing what I do ; any of you guys make that ?
